message:
fix(wal): downgrade transient WAL frame salt/checksum warnings from ERROR to WARN

The WAL frame salt mismatch and checksum mismatch messages are
transient conditions that occur normally during WAL reading (e.g.,
after checkpoint restart/truncate). The WAL reader handles them
correctly by breaking out of the frame scan loop.

ERROR level was alarming users running read-only br commands.
WARN level is appropriate: visible for debugging but not scary.

The WAL header checksum mismatch remains at ERROR since that
indicates actual corruption (returns FrankenError::WalCorrupt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
